mapper.select: UPDATE "file_resource" SET "status" = 'VALIDATING', "status_revision" = "status_revision" + 1, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "detected_mime_type" = #{detectedMimeType}, "file_size" = #{fileSize}, "sha256" = #{sha256}, "confirmed_time" = NOW(), "orphaned_time" = NOW(), "error_code" = '', "error_message" = '' WHERE "file_id" = #{fileId} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE AND "status" = 'PENDING_UPLOAD' AND "upload_expires_at" >= NOW() RETURNING
mapper.update: UPDATE "file_resource" SET "status" = 'READY', "status_revision" = "status_revision" + 1, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "detected_mime_type" = #{detectedMimeType}, "sha256" = #{sha256}, "extracted_text" = #{extractedText}, "extraction_metadata" = CAST(#{extractionMetadata} AS JSONB), "extraction_truncated" = #{extractionTruncated}, "width" = #{width}, "height" = #{height}, "ready_time" = NOW(), "error_code" = '', "error_message" = '' WHERE "id" = #{id} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE AND "status" = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE "file_resource" SET "status" = 'VALIDATING', "status_revision" = "status_revision" + 1, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "error_code" = '', "error_message" = '' WHERE "id" = #{id} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE AND "status" = 'FAILED'

UPDATE "file_resource" f SET "status" = 'DELETE_REQUESTED', "status_revision" = f."status_revision" + 1, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "reserved_conversation_id" = NULL, "reserved_request_id" = NULL, "reserved_until" = NULL WHERE f."file_id" = #{fileId} AND f."creator_id" = #{userId} AND f."deleted" = FALSE AND f."status" NOT IN ('DELETE_REQUESTED', 'DELETED') AND (f."reserved_until" IS NULL OR f."reserved_until" < NOW()) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM "conversation_round_file" rf WHERE rf."file_resource_id" = f."id" )

UPDATE "file_resource" SET "reserved_conversation_id" = NULL, "reserved_request_id" = NULL, "reserved_until" = NULL WHERE "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "reserved_conversation_id" = #{conversationId} AND "deleted" = FALSE

UPDATE "file_resource" SET "status" = 'DELETED', "status_revision" = "status_revision" + 1, "modifier_id" = #{userId}, "deleted" = TRUE, "extracted_text" = NULL, "extraction_metadata" = NULL, "reserved_conversation_id" = NULL, "reserved_request_id" = NULL, "reserved_until" = NULL WHERE "id" = #{id} AND "creator_id" = #{userId} AND "deleted" = FALSE
